fragility_points: A sustained move above roughly 74.5k-75k before settlement would weaken the variant case.
This is a short-horizon estimate and is highly sensitive to overnight price action.
key_assumptions: Current above-threshold spot level does not fully carry through to the exact noon ET one-minute close.
Recent Binance minute-level distribution is informative about threshold fragility.
Binance API klines are close enough to the referenced Binance UI candle data for pre-settlement analysis.
main_logical_chain: The contract resolves on one exact Binance BTC/USDT one-minute close at 12:00 ET on April 17.
BTC is currently above 74000 on Binance, so Yes deserves a baseline edge.
But the cushion above 74000 is modest relative to observed minute-level variability and recent dips below threshold.
Therefore Yes should be favored only modestly, below the market's 61% implied probability.
main_thesis: The market slightly overprices Yes because this is a narrow Binance-only exact-noon threshold test and BTC's current cushion above 74000 is not large.
quote_anchors: The final Close must be strictly greater than 74,000.
source_quality_view: Primary quality is high because Binance is the governing venue and Polymarket rules are explicit; independence is medium and there is minor UI/API source-of-truth ambiguity.
strongest_disconfirmers: BTC is already above 74000 on the governing venue, so simple persistence could justify the market's 61% Yes price.
Cross-venue checks broadly confirmed the same mid-74k price region.
strongest_supports: Binance BTCUSDT was trading around 74.6k-74.7k during the run, already above the threshold.
761 of the last 1000 Binance one-minute closes were above 74000.
timing_relevance: High: the market is decided by a single noon ET minute on April 17, so point-in-time fragility matters more than generic daily direction.
unresolved_ambiguities: Small operational ambiguity remains between Binance UI candle presentation and API-delivered kline values.
No closer-to-settlement sample was available yet.
what_would_change_view: I would move toward or above the market if BTC built and held a materially wider cushion above 74000 into the settlement window.
